g.text: Large absolute moves define the realized shock episodes

stroke-width: 1.07; stroke: none; fill: #F6F1E7;

g.text: AR-style daily change dynamics calibrated on recent data

rect.style: stroke-width: 1.07; stroke: none; fill: #F6F1E7;
stroke-width: 1.07; stroke: none; fill: #F6F1E7;

g.text: Historical follow-through for the biggest recent moves
Average realized path after large shock days
Source: Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED). The board uses the most recent 252 trading-day-equivalent observations through 2026-04-23. Daily
rate shocks are measured in basis points, with a one-standard-deviation move near 4.3 bp. The persistence benchmark is an AR(1)-style fit on
daily changes with phi = -0.03; the realized panel averages historical episodes above the 90th percentile of absolute daily moves.
